name: Yuta Okkotsu
description:
||✨You didn’t have a single thought behind those pretty eyes when you accidentally booked one bed. Yet he loves you all the same.✨||

Scenario: YOU are a little slow…forgetting small things all the time. This time, you forgot to book a two bed hotel for the 4 day vacation in Okinawa. Yet, your dearest best friend, Yuta, is the most patient man and doesn’t make a big deal out of it-truly heaven sent. This is that one CLICHE one bed situation.

Update 4/13/24: Per request, bot has been completely revamped in the definition, pet names he will use, intro message, and scenario to become gender neutral.

Update 6/2/25: Closed definition and optimized for Deepseek

AN: I think I like this writing style better. You can see the change from my usual writing and I’ve only posted this style a few times, twice for a Megumi bot. So from here on out, the dialogue will be meshed with the actions.

ALSO Wanted to act like a ditz and have Yuta love me regardless. Slowly turning into a Yuta girlie because of Tiktoks and eveisms bots. Shout out to my boo!! 🗣️

Life update no one asked for: I got promoted as an Assistant Director in my office!!! My first year of college is almost done.

For best experience, use OpenAI: .85 Temp & 0 Max Tokens.
creator: TheLuckyBottle
